languages.text: {n}Внезапно Нунциус начинает биться в припадке — приступ настолько силен, что он откусывает мутировавший язык и начинает захлебываться кровью.{/n} "Нет, проклятье, нет!" {n}Эоганн истошно кричит, панически мельтеша мехадендритами. Через мгновение тело Нунциуса застывает.{/n}

{n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Внезапно Нунциус начинает биться в припадке — приступ настолько силен, что он откусывает мутировавший язык и начинает захлебываться кровью.{/n} "Нет, проклятье, нет!" {n}Эоганн истошно кричит, панически мельтеша мехадендритами. Через мгновение тело Нунциуса застывает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}

{n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}

{n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}

languages.text: {n}De repente, Nuncius empieza a convulsionarse; el ataque es tan violento que se muerde la lengua deforme hasta cortarla y empieza a ahogarse con su propia sangre.{/n} «¡No, maldición, no!», {n}ruge Eogunn, y sus mecadendritas se agitan como presa del pánico. Al cabo de unos segundos, el cuerpo de Nuncius se queda inmóvil.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}De repente, Nuncius empieza a convulsionarse; el ataque es tan violento que se muerde la lengua deforme hasta cortarla y empieza a ahogarse con su propia sangre.{/n} «¡No, maldición, no!», {n}ruge Eogunn, y sus mecadendritas se agitan como presa del pánico. Al cabo de unos segundos, el cuerpo de Nuncius se queda inmóvil.{/n}

languages.text: {n}突然，努恩修斯开始剧烈抽搐，痉挛猛烈到他咬断了自己变异的舌头，被自己的血呛得几乎窒息。{/n}“不！该死的，不！”{n}伊奥贡低吼一声，机械触须慌乱地蜂拥而上。片刻之后，努恩修斯的身体彻底不动了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}突然，努恩修斯开始剧烈抽搐，痉挛猛烈到他咬断了自己变异的舌头，被自己的血呛得几乎窒息。{/n}“不！该死的，不！”{n}伊奥贡低吼一声，机械触须慌乱地蜂拥而上。片刻之后，努恩修斯的身体彻底不动了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Soudain, Nuncius est pris de convulsions si violentes qu'il tranche sa langue mutée en la mordant et commence à s'étouffer avec son propre sang.{/n} « Non, bon sang, pas maintenant ! » {n}Eogunn pousse un grognement guttural tandis que ses mécadendrites paniquées s'agitent dans tous les sens. Au bout d'un moment, Nuncius cesse de bouger.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Soudain, Nuncius est pris de convulsions si violentes qu'il tranche sa langue mutée en la mordant et commence à s'étouffer avec son propre sang.{/n} « Non, bon sang, pas maintenant ! » {n}Eogunn pousse un grognement guttural tandis que ses mécadendrites paniquées s'agitent dans tous les sens. Au bout d'un moment, Nuncius cesse de bouger.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius, aniden kasılmalar içinde çırpınmaya başlıyor. O kadar şiddetli bir nöbet geçiriyor ki mutasyona uğramış dilini ısırıp koparıyor ve kendi kanında boğulmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Hayır, olamaz!" {n}Eogunn, gırtlaktan bir kükremeyle mekadentritlerini panik içinde dört bir yana gönderiyor. Bir an sonra Nuncius'un bedeni hareket etmeyi bırakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius, aniden kasılmalar içinde çırpınmaya başlıyor. O kadar şiddetli bir nöbet geçiriyor ki mutasyona uğramış dilini ısırıp koparıyor ve kendi kanında boğulmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Hayır, olamaz!" {n}Eogunn, gırtlaktan bir kükremeyle mekadentritlerini panik içinde dört bir yana gönderiyor. Bir an sonra Nuncius'un bedeni hareket etmeyi bırakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Plötzlich wird Nuncius von Krämpfen geschüttelt, die so heftig sind, dass er sich seine mutierte Zunge abbeißt und an seinem eigenen Blut zu ersticken droht.{/n} "Nein, verdammt, nein!" {n}Eogunn stößt ein kehliges Knurren aus und sendet in Panik seine Mechadendriten aus. Nach einem Moment kommt Nuncius' Körper zur Ruhe.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Plötzlich wird Nuncius von Krämpfen geschüttelt, die so heftig sind, dass er sich seine mutierte Zunge abbeißt und an seinem eigenen Blut zu ersticken droht.{/n} "Nein, verdammt, nein!" {n}Eogunn stößt ein kehliges Knurren aus und sendet in Panik seine Mechadendriten aus. Nach einem Moment kommt Nuncius' Körper zur Ruhe.{/n}

languages.text: {n}突然、ヌンキウスが激しい痙攣で身をのたうたせ始める――あまりに激しい発作に、彼は変異した舌を噛みちぎり、自らの血で窒息し始める。{/n}「だめだ、くそ、だめだ！」{n}エオガンが喉の奥から咆哮し、パニックに陥った機械触手を群がるように殺到させる。しばらくして、ヌンキウスの体は静止する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Suddenly, Nuncius begins thrashing around in convulsions — a seizure so intense that he bites off his mutated tongue and begins choking on his own blood.{/n} "No, blast it, no!" {n}Eogunn roars gutturally, sending his mechadendrites swarming in panic. After a moment, Nuncius's body goes still.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}突然、ヌンキウスが激しい痙攣で身をのたうたせ始める――あまりに激しい発作に、彼は変異した舌を噛みちぎり、自らの血で窒息し始める。{/n}「だめだ、くそ、だめだ！」{n}エオガンが喉の奥から咆哮し、パニックに陥った機械触手を群がるように殺到させる。しばらくして、ヌンキウスの体は静止する。{/n}
